content: {"file":"@angular/forms/fesm2022/forms.mjs","summary":"This file contains Angular's form module definitions and utilities, including FormBuilder for creating forms, FormControl, FormGroup, FormArray, and FormRecord classes for managing form controls, validators, and reactive forms. It also includes directives like NgModel, FormControlDirective, and FormGroupDirective for template-driven and reactive forms.","rules":[{"name":"Form Validation","description":"Enforces the use of validation rules on form controls.","conditions":["isFormControl","isFormGroup"],"actions":["applyValidators"]},{"name":"Form Control Initialization","description":"Ensures that form controls are properly initialized with default values or states.","conditions":["control","group","array"],"actions":["initializeControl"]},{"name":"Form Array Management","description":"Handles the creation and management of FormArray instances.","conditions":["isFormArray"],"actions":["createFromArray","clearControls"]}],"dependencies":["@angular/core","rxjs","tslib"]}
